title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Aftermath
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #6, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #4, Luffy as the scene develops across pages 17–19.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #6, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: aftermath.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's screaming out....!!! and that's why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He needs my strength on his side!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Heraclesun!! I want to become strong!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And my name is hereacle- Sun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It sure is an awesome name!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: These are the seeds of that plant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Each type has its own effective usersun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Run!!! This forest will make you strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...by becoming the true King of Snippers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Your curtains smell like shit you bitch...

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #6, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: aftermath.
